with:
  def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
      """
      Convert a list of building‑related triples into a single fluent natural‑language sentence.
      """
      def clean(o: str) -> str:
          return o.strip('"').strip("'")
  
      clauses = []
      for t in triples:
          s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, clean(t.object)
  
          # Specific phrasing for common predicates
          if p == "capital":
              clauses.append(f"The capital of {s} is {o}")
          elif p == "leader":
              clauses.append(f"The leader of {s} is {o}")
          elif p == "currency":
              clauses.append(f"{s} uses the currency {o}")
          elif p == "location":
              clauses.append(f"{s} is located in {o}")
          elif p == "isPartOf":
              clauses.append(f"{s} is part of {o}")
          elif p == "buildingStartDate":
              clauses.append(f"Construction of {s} started in {o}")
          elif p == "completionDate":
              clauses.append(f"{s} was completed in {o}")
          elif p == "height":
              clauses.append(f"{s} rises to {o} metres")
          elif p == "architect":
              clauses.append(f"{s} was designed by {o}")
  ... (30 more lines)
